revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：[[式内社]]（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|12=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|12=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|12=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|12=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|12=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|12=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|12=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|12=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|12=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|12=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：[[式内社]]（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=draft|12=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|12=draft|12=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|12=draft|12=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|12=draft|12=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft|12=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=draft|12=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|12=draft|12=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=draft|12=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=draft|12=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=draft|12=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=draft|12=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=draft|12=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=draft|12=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft|12=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：[[式内社]]（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=draft|12=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|12=draft|12=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|12=draft|12=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|12=draft|12=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft|12=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=draft|12=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|12=draft|12=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=draft|12=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=draft|12=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=draft|12=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=draft|12=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=draft|12=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=draft|12=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft|12=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|延喜式神名帳|" to "|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|"
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：[[式内社]]（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=draft|12=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|12=draft|12=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|12=draft|12=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|12=draft|12=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft|12=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=draft|12=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|12=draft|12=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=draft|12=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=draft|12=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=draft|12=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=draft|12=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=draft|12=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=draft|12=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=draft|12=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:摂末社]] to [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：[[式内社]]（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=draft|12=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|12=draft|12=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|12=draft|12=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|12=draft|12=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft|12=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=draft|12=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|12=draft|12=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=draft|12=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=draft|12=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=draft|12=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=draft|12=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=draft|12=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=draft|12=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=draft|12=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "伊勢市の神社" to "Shrines in Ise City"
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：[[式内社]]（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=draft|12=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|12=draft|12=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|12=draft|12=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|12=draft|12=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft|12=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=draft|12=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|12=draft|12=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|12=draft|12=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=draft|12=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=draft|12=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=draft|12=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=draft|12=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=draft|12=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|12=draft|12=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=draft|12=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=draft|12=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=draft|12=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|12=draft|12=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=draft|12=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.comment: 7 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:宇須乃野神社 up to rev 88828008
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：[[式内社]]（小）、[[豊受大神宮]]摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[ファイル:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''宇須乃野神社'''（うすののじんじゃ）は、[[伊勢神宮]][[豊受大神宮]]（外宮）の[[摂末社|摂社]]。外宮の摂社16社のうち第14位である宇治山田市役所 編（1929）：11 - 13ページ。本項目では、宇須乃野神社と同座する、外宮末社の'''県神社'''せんぐう館"[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php 式年遷宮記念 せんぐう館|125社5]"（2013年10月10日閲覧。）（あがたじんじゃ、'''縣神社'''宇治山田市役所 編（1929）：14ページ伊勢文化舎（2008）：52ページ学研パブリッシング（2013）：64ページ とも表記）についても記述する。 2社とも、山田原を構成する[[原野]]の1つである宇須野（宇須乃野）にゆかりの深い神社である。 == 概要 == [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]御薗町高向（みそのちょうたかぶく）字南世古2653に鎮座する式内社研究会 編（1990）：370ページ。御薗町高向のほぼ中央、[[住宅街]]の中にある。[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄山田線|山田線]] [[宮町駅]]東口から高向の[[集落]]に向かって進むと2つの森が現れ、左側にあるのが高向大社、右側にあるのが宇須乃野神社・県神社である。 [[境内]]を覆う大きな[[クスノキ]]は宇須乃野神社を象徴する木であり、[[樹齢]]はおよそ1000年と伝えられる。 [[社殿]]は[[神明造]]の[[板葺]]で、[[玉垣]]に囲まれている。[[神明鳥居]]を有する。[[賽銭]]箱は置かれていない。境内の[[面積]]は1,101[[平方メートル|m2]]。 == 宇須乃野神社 == 社名の「宇須乃野」は鎮座地周辺の原野の名前である。 [[祭神]]は宇須乃女命（うすのめのみこと）。[[五穀豊穣]]の[[神 (神道)|神]]である。『神名秘書』では「五穀霊神」、『伊勢度会郡高向郷高向村高向神社記』では「御神霊二座[[ウカノミタマ|宇賀能美多麻神]]亦宇賀能賣神是也。」、『神名帳再考』では「一名[[カヤノヒメ|草野姫命]]」とする。 == 県神社 == 県神社は外宮の末社8社のうち、[[伊我理神社]]に次ぐ第2位である宇治山田市役所 編（1929）：14 - 15ページ。 祭神は縣神（あがたのかみ）。鎮座地・高向の上田（あがた）の守護神である。 == 歴史 == 伊勢神宮の摂社の定義より『[[延喜式神名帳]]』成立、すなわち[[延長 (元号)|延長]]5年（[[927年]]）以前に創建された伊勢文化舎（2008）：22ページ。同書には現社名と同じ「宇須乃野神社」と記載されている。『止由気宮儀式帳』にも「高河原社」として記載がある ことから[[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前から存在した ことになる。『伊勢度会郡高向郷高向村高向神社記』によると、理由は不明であるが数度に渡って社殿が大破し、高向大社を[[方位|方角]]の基準として再建したという。 その後[[祭祀]]が行われなくなり、[[近世]]には社地不明となるが、[[寛文]]3年（[[1663年]]）に現社地で再興された。社殿は[[1911年]]（[[明治]]44年）3月に建て替えが行われた宇治山田市役所 編（1929）：12ページ。[[1958年]]（[[昭和]]33年）10月にも造り替えが行われ、[[1982年]]（昭和57年）[[11月12日]]に大修繕が施された。 == 祭祀 == [[祈年祭]]（[[2月20日]]）、[[月次祭]]（[[6月20日]]・[[12月20日]]）、[[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]）、[[新嘗祭]]（[[11月26日]]）は、[[禰宜]]（ねぎ）・宮掌・出仕が巡回祭典の形で境内にて祭祀を執行し、[[歳旦祭]]（[[1月1日]]）、[[元始祭]]（[[1月3日]]）、建国記念祭（[[2月11日]]）、風日祈祭（[[5月14日]]・[[8月14日]]）、[[天長祭]]（[[12月23日]]）は遥祀を行う式内社研究会 編（1990）：371ページ。 == 交通 == 宮町駅または[[山田上口駅]]を拠点として神宮125社めぐりを行う場合、宇須乃野神社へ最初に[[参拝]]する人が多い。 ; 公共交通 * 近鉄山田線 宮町駅より徒歩で約15分。 * [[東海旅客鉄道|JR]][[参宮線]] 山田上口駅より徒歩で約21分（約1.7[[キロメートル|km]]）。 * [[三重交通]][[路線バス|バス]]「高向北」[[バス停留所|バス停]]より徒歩で約5分。 ; 自家用車 * [[伊勢自動車道]] [[伊勢西インターチェンジ|伊勢西IC]]より[[三重県道32号伊勢磯部線]]（御木本道路）・[[三重県道60号伊勢松阪線]]を経由、約11分（約5.1[[キロメートル|km]]）。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == 関連項目 == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[神宮125社の一覧]] * [[縣神社]] == 外部リンク == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{神宮125社}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うすののしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:神宮125社]] [[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]]

revision.comment: Bot: restore translated version
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：[[式内社]]（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|qq=draft|qq=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]] {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}}
