The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|qq=draft|qq=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[式内社]]" to "{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}}"
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}}（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|qq=draft|qq=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "伊勢国の式内社一覧|" to "伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|"
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|qq=draft|qq=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|qq=draft|qq=draft}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.comment: Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/branch shrine|qq=}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Grand Shrine|qq=}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|qq=}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|qq=}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise|qq=}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamachi Station|qq=}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kintetsu Yamada Line|qq=}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Camphor tree|qq=}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|qq=}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei-zukuri|qq=}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamagaki|qq=}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|qq=}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|qq=}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami|qq=}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bountiful harvest|qq=}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|qq=}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|qq=}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|qq=}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinen-sai|qq=}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannamesai|qq=}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niinamesai|qq=}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|qq=}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|qq=}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Kotsu|qq=}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Expressway|qq=}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|qq=}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|qq=}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bountiful harvest|qq=}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|qq=}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|qq=}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|qq=}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinen-sai|qq=}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannamesai|qq=}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niinamesai|qq=}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|qq=}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|qq=}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Kotsu|qq=}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Expressway|qq=}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|qq=}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|qq=}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/branch shrine|qq=}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Grand Shrine|qq=}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|qq=}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|qq=}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise|qq=}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamachi Station|qq=}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kintetsu Yamada Line|qq=}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Camphor tree|qq=}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|qq=}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei-zukuri|qq=}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamagaki|qq=}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|qq=}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|qq=}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami|qq=}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bountiful harvest|qq=}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|qq=}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|qq=}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|qq=}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinen-sai|qq=}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannamesai|qq=}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niinamesai|qq=}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|qq=}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|qq=}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Kotsu|qq=}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Expressway|qq=}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|qq=}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|qq=}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|qq=}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|qq=}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise|qq=}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|ja|宮町駅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamachi Station|qq=}} on the {{ill|Kintetsu Yamada Line|ja|近鉄山田線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kintetsu Yamada Line|qq=}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Camphor tree|qq=}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|qq=}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei-zukuri|qq=}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamagaki|qq=}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|qq=}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|qq=}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami|qq=}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|豊作|lt_ja=五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bountiful harvest|qq=}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|qq=}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|qq=}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|qq=}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|ja|祈年祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinen-sai|qq=}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannamesai|qq=}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niinamesai|ja|新嘗祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niinamesai|qq=}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|qq=}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|qq=}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Kotsu|qq=}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|ja|伊勢自動車道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Expressway|qq=}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|qq=}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|qq=}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Branch shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:Shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[sn:Usunono Shrine]] [[sn:sunono Shrine]]

{{神社 |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}（小）、{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|branch shrine|ja|摂末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/branch shrine|qq=}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Grand Shrine|qq=}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|qq=}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|qq=}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise|qq=}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. The large {{ill|Camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Camphor tree|qq=}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|qq=}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei-zukuri|qq=}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|ja|玉垣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamagaki|qq=}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|qq=}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|qq=}}. A deity of {{ill|Bountiful harvest|ja|豊作|lt_ja=五穀豊穣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bountiful harvest|qq=}}. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3).
