[[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17194134]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}（小）、{{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] |prefecture= {{ill|Ise|WD=Q328067}} |coordinates= {{Coord|34.505694|N|136.698611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |architecture_style= {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|WD=Q930545}} }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a [[:en:Setsumatsusha|branch shrine]] of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine) within the [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 縣神社}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]][[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise]] Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of [[:en:Miyamachi Station|Miyamachi Station]] on the [[:en:Yamada Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Yamada Line]], two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large [[:en:Camphora officinarum|Camphor tree]] covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社建築|1=Shinto architecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080012}} is built in [[:en:Shinmei-zukuri|Shinmei-zukuri]] style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a [[:en:Tamagaki|Tamagaki]]. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鳥居|1=torii|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q234731}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|WD=Q135491444}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami|qq=}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of [[:en:Bumper crop|Bountiful harvest]]. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カヤノヒメ|1=Kaya-no-hime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8191878}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == [[:en:Kinen-sai|Kinen-sai]] (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (October 20), and [[:en:Niiname-no-Matsuri|Niinamesai]] (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|1=Kazahi-no-Misai|2=ja|3=風日祈祭|WD=Q135524493|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135524493}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天皇誕生日|1=The Emperor's Birthday|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q72318}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * [[:en:Mie Kotsu|Mie Kotsu]] Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * [[:en:Ise Expressway|Ise Expressway]] Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 32|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357920}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 60|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358021}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[:en:学研パブリッシング|学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[:en:Kogakkan University|Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == '''Usunono Shrine (Q17194134)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17194134]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}（小）、{{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] |prefecture= {{ill|Ise|WD=Q328067}} |coordinates= {{Coord|34.505694|N|136.698611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |architecture_style= {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|WD=Q930545}} }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a [[:en:Setsumatsusha|branch shrine]] of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine) within the [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 縣神社}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]][[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise]] Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of [[:en:Miyamachi Station|Miyamachi Station]] on the [[:en:Yamada Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Yamada Line]], two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large [[:en:Camphora officinarum|Camphor tree]] covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社建築|1=Shinto architecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080012}} is built in [[:en:Shinmei-zukuri|Shinmei-zukuri]] style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a [[:en:Tamagaki|Tamagaki]]. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鳥居|1=torii|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q234731}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|WD=Q135491444}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami|qq=}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of [[:en:Bumper crop|Bountiful harvest]]. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カヤノヒメ|1=Kaya-no-hime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8191878}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == [[:en:Kinen-sai|Kinen-sai]] (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (October 20), and [[:en:Niiname-no-Matsuri|Niinamesai]] (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|1=Kazahi-no-Misai|2=ja|3=風日祈祭|WD=Q135524493|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135524493}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天皇誕生日|1=The Emperor's Birthday|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q72318}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * [[:en:Mie Kotsu|Mie Kotsu]] Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * [[:en:Ise Expressway|Ise Expressway]] Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 32|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357920}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 60|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358021}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[:en:学研パブリッシング|学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[:en:Kogakkan University|Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == '''Usunono Shrine (Q17194134)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Watarai District|en|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|ceb|Watarai-gun|ckb|گەڕەکی واتاری|es|Distrito de Watarai|fr|District de Watarai|id|Distrik Watarai, Mie|it|Distretto di Watarai|ko|와타라이군|pl|Powiat Watarai|uk|Повіт Ватарай|zh|度會郡|lt=Watarai district|WD=Q1131032}} || {{ill|Usunono Shrine|lt=Usunono Shrine|ja|宇須乃野神社|WD=Q17194134}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized}} || {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} || part of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|WD=Q11633343}} || — || {{coord|34.505734|136.698637|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181152 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q17194134}}==Notes== [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)]] [[Category:Merged Shikinaisha autogenerations]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

[[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17194134]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}（小）、{{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] |prefecture= {{ill|Ise|WD=Q328067}} |coordinates= {{Coord|34.505694|N|136.698611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |architecture_style= {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|WD=Q930545}} }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a [[:en:Setsumatsusha|branch shrine]] of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine) within the [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 縣神社}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]][[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise]] Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of [[:en:Miyamachi Station|Miyamachi Station]] on the [[:en:Yamada Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Yamada Line]], two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large [[:en:Camphora officinarum|Camphor tree]] covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社建築|1=Shinto architecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080012}} is built in [[:en:Shinmei-zukuri|Shinmei-zukuri]] style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a [[:en:Tamagaki|Tamagaki]]. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鳥居|1=torii|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q234731}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|WD=Q135491444}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami|qq=}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of [[:en:Bumper crop|Bountiful harvest]]. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カヤノヒメ|1=Kaya-no-hime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8191878}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == [[:en:Kinen-sai|Kinen-sai]] (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (October 20), and [[:en:Niiname-no-Matsuri|Niinamesai]] (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|1=Kazahi-no-Misai|2=ja|3=風日祈祭|WD=Q135524493|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135524493}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天皇誕生日|1=The Emperor's Birthday|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q72318}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * [[:en:Mie Kotsu|Mie Kotsu]] Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * [[:en:Ise Expressway|Ise Expressway]] Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 32|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357920}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 60|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358021}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[:en:学研パブリッシング|学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[:en:Kogakkan University|Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == '''Usunono Shrine (Q17194134)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Watarai District|en|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|ceb|Watarai-gun|ckb|گەڕەکی واتاری|es|Distrito de Watarai|fr|District de Watarai|id|Distrik Watarai, Mie|it|Distretto di Watarai|ko|와타라이군|pl|Powiat Watarai|uk|Повіт Ватарай|zh|度會郡|lt=Watarai district|WD=Q1131032}} || {{ill|Usunono Shrine|lt=Usunono Shrine|ja|宇須乃野神社|WD=Q17194134}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized}} || {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} || part of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|WD=Q11633343}} || — || {{coord|34.505734|136.698637|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181152 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q17194134}}==Notes== [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)]] [[Category:Merged Shikinaisha autogenerations]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17194134]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}（小）、{{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] |prefecture= {{ill|Ise|WD=Q328067}} |coordinates= {{Coord|34.505694|N|136.698611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |architecture_style= {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|WD=Q930545}} }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a [[:en:Setsumatsusha|branch shrine]] of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine) within the [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 縣神社}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]][[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise]] Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of [[:en:Miyamachi Station|Miyamachi Station]] on the [[:en:Yamada Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Yamada Line]], two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large [[:en:Camphora officinarum|Camphor tree]] covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社建築|1=Shinto architecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080012}} is built in [[:en:Shinmei-zukuri|Shinmei-zukuri]] style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a [[:en:Tamagaki|Tamagaki]]. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鳥居|1=torii|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q234731}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|WD=Q135491444}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami|qq=}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of [[:en:Bumper crop|Bountiful harvest]]. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カヤノヒメ|1=Kaya-no-hime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8191878}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == [[:en:Kinen-sai|Kinen-sai]] (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (October 20), and [[:en:Niiname-no-Matsuri|Niinamesai]] (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|1=Kazahi-no-Misai|2=ja|3=風日祈祭|WD=Q135524493|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135524493}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天皇誕生日|1=The Emperor's Birthday|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q72318}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * [[:en:Mie Kotsu|Mie Kotsu]] Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * [[:en:Ise Expressway|Ise Expressway]] Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 32|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357920}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 60|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358021}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[:en:学研パブリッシング|学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[:en:Kogakkan University|Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == '''Usunono Shrine (Q17194134)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Watarai District|en|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|ceb|Watarai-gun|ckb|گەڕەکی واتاری|es|Distrito de Watarai|fr|District de Watarai|id|Distrik Watarai, Mie|it|Distretto di Watarai|ko|와타라이군|pl|Powiat Watarai|uk|Повіт Ватарай|zh|度會郡|lt=Watarai district|WD=Q1131032}} || {{ill|Usunono Shrine|lt=Usunono Shrine|ja|宇須乃野神社|WD=Q17194134}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized}} || {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} || part of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|WD=Q11633343}} || — || {{coord|34.505734|136.698637|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181152 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q17194134}}==Notes== [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)]] [[Category:Merged Shikinaisha autogenerations]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17194134]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}（小）、{{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] |prefecture= {{ill|Ise|WD=Q328067}} |coordinates= {{Coord|34.505694|N|136.698611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |architecture_style= {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|WD=Q930545}} }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a [[:en:Setsumatsusha|branch shrine]] of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine) within the [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 縣神社}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]][[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise]] Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of [[:en:Miyamachi Station|Miyamachi Station]] on the [[:en:Yamada Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Yamada Line]], two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large [[:en:Camphora officinarum|Camphor tree]] covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社建築|1=Shinto architecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080012}} is built in [[:en:Shinmei-zukuri|Shinmei-zukuri]] style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a [[:en:Tamagaki|Tamagaki]]. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鳥居|1=torii|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q234731}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|WD=Q135491444}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami|qq=}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of [[:en:Bumper crop|Bountiful harvest]]. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カヤノヒメ|1=Kaya-no-hime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8191878}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == [[:en:Kinen-sai|Kinen-sai]] (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (October 20), and [[:en:Niiname-no-Matsuri|Niinamesai]] (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|1=Kazahi-no-Misai|2=ja|3=風日祈祭|WD=Q135524493|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135524493}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天皇誕生日|1=The Emperor's Birthday|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q72318}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * [[:en:Mie Kotsu|Mie Kotsu]] Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * [[:en:Ise Expressway|Ise Expressway]] Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 32|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357920}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 60|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358021}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[:en:学研パブリッシング|学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[:en:Kogakkan University|Kogakkan University]]出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == '''Usunono Shrine (Q17194134)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17194134]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称= 宇須乃野神社・県神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= File:Usunono & Agata-jinja 02.jpg |所在地= [[三重県]][[Ise, Mie]]御薗町高向字南世古2653 |緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 20.5 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55.0 |地図= Japan Mie |祭神= 宇須乃野神社：宇須乃女命
県神社：縣神 |社格= 宇須乃野神社：{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}（小）、{{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}摂社
県神社：豊受大神宮末社 |創建= [[延暦]]23rd year （[[804]]）以前 |本殿= [[神明造]] |別名= |札所等= |例祭= |神事= [[神嘗祭]] |prefecture= {{ill|Ise|WD=Q328067}} |coordinates= {{Coord|34.505694|N|136.698611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |architecture_style= {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|WD=Q930545}} }} [[File:Takabuku Taisha.jpg|thumb|220px|right|高向大社]] '''Usunono Shrine''' (宇須乃野神社) is a {{ill|Setsumatsusha|en|Setsumatsusha|WD=Q1071160|lt=branch shrine}} of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine) within the {{ill|Ise Shrine|en|Ise Shrine|WD=Q687168|lt=Ise Grand Shrine}} complex. It holds the 14th position among the 16 branch shrines of the Outer Shrine.Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), pp. 11–13. This article also covers the {{ill|Agata Shrine|ja|県神社|lt=Agata Shrine|lt_ja=縣神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 縣神社}}, a {{ill|minor shrine|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/minor shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the Outer Shrine, which is co-located with Usunono Shrine.[[Sengukan Museum]] "[http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/shrine/area06.php Commemorating the Shikinen Sengu | 125 Shrines Part 5]" (accessed October 10, 2013).Ujiyamada City Office, ed. (1929), p. 14.Ise Bunka-sha (2008), p. 52.Gakken Publishing (2013), p. 64. Both shrines are deeply connected to Usuno (宇須乃野), one of the wilderness areas that make up the Yamadahara region. == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}}{{ill|Ise, Mie|en|Ise, Mie|WD=Q328067|lt=Ise}} Misano Town, Takabuku (Misanocho Takabuku), Minamiyoseko 2653Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 370. Located almost in the center of Misano Town, Takabuku, within a residential area. Heading from the east exit of {{ill|Miyamachi Station|en|Miyamachi Station|WD=Q1710076|lt=Miyamachi Station}} on the {{ill|Yamada Line (Kintetsu)|en|Yamada Line (Kintetsu)|WD=Q900630|lt=Kintetsu Yamada Line}}, two groves appear toward the settlement of Takabuku; the left is Takabuku Taisha, and the right is Usunono Shrine and Agata Shrine. The large {{ill|Camphora officinarum|en|Camphora officinarum|WD=Q158722|lt=Camphor tree}} covering the precincts symbolizes Usunono Shrine and is said to be about 1,000 years old. The {{ill|Shaden (Shrine building)|ja|社殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaden (Shrine building)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社建築|1=Shinto architecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080012}} is built in {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|en|Shinmei-zukuri|WD=Q930545|lt=Shinmei-zukuri}} style with wooden shingles, surrounded by a {{ill|Tamagaki|en|Tamagaki|WD=Q3078312|lt=Tamagaki}}. It features a {{ill|Shinmei Torii|ja|神明鳥居|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Torii|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鳥居|1=torii|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q234731}}. There is no {{ill|Offertory box|ja|賽銭箱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Offertory box|WD=Q135491444}}. The precinct area is 1,101 m². == Usunono Shrine == The name "Usunono" refers to the wilderness area around the shrine. The {{ill|Kami|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami|qq=}} is Usunome-no-Mikoto (宇須乃女命). A deity of {{ill|Bumper crop|en|Bumper crop|WD=Q4997332|lt=Bountiful harvest}}. According to 'Jinmyo Hisyo,' identified as "Gokokureijin," while 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record' refers to "Goshinrei Niza {{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇賀能美多麻神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and Uganome-no-Kami," and 'Jinmyocho Saiko' mentions "also known as {{ill|Kayano-hime|ja|草野姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayano-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カヤノヒメ|1=Kaya-no-hime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8191878}}". == Agata Shrine == Agata Shrine is the 2nd-Ranked {{ill|Matsu-sha|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsu-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} of the outer shrine, following {{ill|Igari Shrine|ja|伊我理神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igari Shrine|qq=}}Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): pages 14-15. The enshrined deity is Agata-no-Kami (縣神). The guardian deity of Takabuku's Agata area. == History == Founded before the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (927), according to the definition of Ise Grand Shrine's branch shrinesIse Culture Publishing (2008): page 22. The name "Usunono Shrine" appears in the same text. Also listed as "Takakawara Shrine" in the 'Toyuke Miya Ritual Book', indicating existence before 804 (Enryaku 23). According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|en|Kinen-sai|WD=Q118906710|lt=Kinen-sai}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai Festival|en|Kannamesai Festival|WD=Q11255045|lt=Kannamesai}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niiname-no-Matsuri|en|Niiname-no-Matsuri|WD=Q11501518|lt=Niinamesai}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|1=Kazahi-no-Misai|2=ja|3=風日祈祭|WD=Q135524493|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135524493}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天皇誕生日|1=The Emperor's Birthday|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q72318}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|en|Mie Kotsu|WD=Q6843516|lt=Mie Kotsu}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|en|Ise Expressway|WD=Q6079578|lt=Ise Expressway}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 32|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357920}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 60|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358021}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[:en:学研パブリッシング|学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』{{ill|Kogakkan University|en|Kogakkan University|WD=Q1797584|lt=Kogakkan University}}出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == '''Usunono Shrine (Q17194134)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Watarai District|en|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|ceb|Watarai-gun|ckb|گەڕەکی واتاری|es|Distrito de Watarai|fr|District de Watarai|id|Distrik Watarai, Mie|it|Distretto di Watarai|ko|와타라이군|pl|Powiat Watarai|uk|Повіт Ватарай|zh|度會郡|lt=Watarai district|WD=Q1131032}} || {{ill|Usunono Shrine|lt=Usunono Shrine|ja|宇須乃野神社|WD=Q17194134}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized}} || {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} || part of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|WD=Q11633343}} || — || {{coord|34.505734|136.698637|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181152 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q17194134}}==Notes== [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)]] [[Category:Merged Shikinaisha autogenerations]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

According to 'Ise Watarai-gun Takabuku Village Takabuku Shrine Record,' the shrine was rebuilt multiple times, using Takabuku Taisha as a reference point. Worship declined, and the shrine site became unknown during the early modern period, but it was revived at its current location in 1663 (Kanbun 3). The shrine was rebuilt in March 1911 (Meiji 44)Ujiyamada City Hall (1929): page 12, renovated again in October 1958 (Showa 33), and extensively restored on November 12, 1982 (Showa 57). == Rituals == {{ill|Kinen-sai|en|Kinen-sai|WD=Q118906710|lt=Kinen-sai}} (February 20), {{ill|Tsukinami-sai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-sai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} (June 20, December 20), {{ill|Kannamesai Festival|en|Kannamesai Festival|WD=Q11255045|lt=Kannamesai}} (October 20), and {{ill|Niiname-no-Matsuri|en|Niiname-no-Matsuri|WD=Q11501518|lt=Niinamesai}} (November 26) are conducted in the precincts by priests, assistants, and attendants. {{ill|Saitan-sai|ja|歳旦祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitan-sai|qq=}} (January 1), {{ill|Genshi-sai|ja|元始祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}} (January 3), National Foundation Day Festival (February 11), {{ill|Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja|風日祈祭|1=Kazahi-no-Misai|2=ja|3=風日祈祭|WD=Q135524493|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaze-no-hi Kinen-sai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135524493}} (May 14, August 14), and {{ill|Tenchō-sai|ja|天長祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō-sai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天皇誕生日|1=The Emperor's Birthday|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q72318}} (December 23) are held remotelyShikinaisha Research Association (1990): page 371. == Access == When visiting the 125 shrines of the Ise Grand Shrine from Miyamachi Station or Yamada Kamiguchi Station, many people start with Usunono Shrine. ; Public Transportation * Kintetsu Yamada Line, Miyamachi Station: approx. 15-minute walk. * JR Sangū Line, Yamada Kamiguchi Station: approx. 21-minute walk (1.7 km). * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|en|Mie Kotsu|WD=Q6843516|lt=Mie Kotsu}} Bus "Takabuku Kita" Stop: approx. 5-minute walk. ; By Car * {{ill|Ise Expressway|en|Ise Expressway|WD=Q6079578|lt=Ise Expressway}} Ise Nishi IC: via {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 32 Ise Isobe Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 32|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357920}} and {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|ja|三重県道60号伊勢松阪線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Prefectural Route 60 Ise Matsusaka Line|1=Mie Prefectural Road Route 60|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358021}}, approx. 11 minutes (5.1 km). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[:en:学研パブリッシング|学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』{{ill|Kogakkan University|en|Kogakkan University|WD=Q1797584|lt=Kogakkan University}}出版部、平成2nd year 2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[縣神社]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_18.jpg 宇須乃野神社] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image2 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area06/area06_21.jpg 県神社]}} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m02/0201.html 宇須乃野神社（うすののじんじゃ） 御同座 縣神社] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 * [http://www.guitar-mg.co.jp/title_buck/24/usunono_kusu_366/usunono_jinja_kusu.htm 宇須乃野神社のクス] - [[寺西化学工業]] {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{translated page|ja|宇須乃野神社|version=88828008|comment=Imported full ja history}} == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == '''Usunono Shrine (Q17194134)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Watarai District|en|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|ceb|Watarai-gun|ckb|گەڕەکی واتاری|es|Distrito de Watarai|fr|District de Watarai|id|Distrik Watarai, Mie|it|Distretto di Watarai|ko|와타라이군|pl|Powiat Watarai|uk|Повіт Ватарай|zh|度會郡|lt=Watarai district|WD=Q1131032}} || {{ill|Usunono Shrine|lt=Usunono Shrine|ja|宇須乃野神社|WD=Q17194134}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized}} || {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} || part of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|WD=Q11633343}} || — || {{coord|34.505734|136.698637|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181152 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q17194134}}==Notes== [[ja:宇須乃野神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Merged Shikinaisha autogenerations]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
